signIn.title: Sign in to Fin
signIn.body: Sign in with your Google account to continue.
signIn.privacyNote: Fin reads your name, email, and profile photo from Google to personalize the app. This stays on this device and is never sent to a server.
signIn.configError: Google Sign-In isn't configured for this app yet.
signIn.signInError: Sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.

landing.title: Welcome to Fin
landing.body: Your finances, all in one place.
